disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden sharp sideways bending of the penis to the left, with severe pain, occurring during an erection tonight
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe exactly what you felt?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: During an erection tonight my penis suddenly bent hard to the left and there was this sharp, severe pain — I honestly thought it had snapped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preceding month of mild, low-grade penile discomfort before the acute episode
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any problems down there before tonight?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask, I've had a bit of mild on-and-off discomfort there for about a month, but nothing like tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Perceived shortening and a narrowed 'hourglass' shape of the shaft during the erection
trigger_question_examples: Did the shape of the penis look different when erect?
Did it look shorter or narrowed anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — it looked shorter than normal and kind of pinched in the middle, like an hourglass.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain resolves completely once the penis returns to a flaccid state
trigger_question_examples: Is there any pain now, when it's soft?
Does the pain go away when the erection settles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When it's soft there's no pain at all — it only hurts when I get hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On self-inspection when asked, reports no large swelling and no dark purple/black bruising of the whole shaft, and did not hear or feel a 'pop' or 'snap'
trigger_question_examples: When you look now, is there any big swelling or dark purple bruising along the whole penis?
Did you hear or feel a popping or snapping sensation when it happened?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Looking now there's no big swelling or purple bruising, and no, I didn't hear or feel any pop — it was more a sharp pain and the bend.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No current persisting or ongoing erection — the erection settled and has not returned
trigger_question_examples: Do you have an erection now that won't go down?
Has it stayed hard since, or has it gone soft?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it went soft not long after and it's stayed soft — there's no ongoing erection.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No difficulty or pain passing urine, no blood at the tip, no discharge and no sores
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble or pain passing urine, or any blood at the tip?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can pass urine fine, no blood, no discharge and no sores.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High acute anxiety and fear of permanent loss of sexual function
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with this right now?
What are you most worried about?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really frightened — I keep thinking I've permanently damaged myself and I'll never be normal again.
